rationale: verification_command: cd cli && go test ./cmd/... -run "TestWorkStatus.*|TestServerWorkers.*" -count=1

The bead's acceptance criteria are already satisfied at base-rev
26fec7ee76f04aba43cce8187d305164628327db. The implementation landed in
commit f4ea19edf "feat(work): scope live worker reports to the requested
project [ddx-c3219628]" and was preserved through the subsequent fix
4a95e919f. Concretely:

- `ddx work status` exists at cli/cmd/work_status.go with --project,
  --all-projects, and --json flags, registered as a subcommand in
  cli/cmd/work.go.
- The supporting package lives at cli/internal/workerstatus/ and
  filters live workers by canonical project root.
- AC1-AC4 tests (TestWorkStatusDefaultsToCurrentProjectOnly,
  TestWorkStatusAllProjectsShowsExplicitGlobalView,
  TestWorkStatusNoLiveWorkersNamesProjectRoot,
  TestWorkStatusInfersBeadAndExecutionWorktree) exist in
  cli/cmd/work_status_test.go and pass.
- AC5/AC6 skill docs already document the project-scoped worker-status
  rule and the --all-projects escape hatch in all three skill trees:
  .agents/skills/ddx/reference/{status,work}.md,
  .claude/skills/ddx/reference/{status,work}.md, and
  cli/internal/skills/ddx/reference/{status,work}.md (verified
  byte-identical with diff).
- `ddx skills check` validates the three skill trees ("validated 24
  skill files").

No code or doc change is required. The verification_command above is
the AC7 test invocation, which exits 0 against the current tree.
